scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html styles.css logo.css dist/ && cat mobile-fix.css >> dist/styles.css && cp -R public/. dist/ && cp 'ChatGPT Image Jul 17, 2026, 10_52_26 PM (1).png' dist/tay-card-front-new.png && cp 'ChatGPT Image Jul 17, 2026, 10_52_26 PM (2).png' dist/tay-card-back-new.png && cp 'ChatGPT Image Jul 17, 2026, 11_02_13 PM.png' dist/tay-logo.png
